scenarios.description: parseFragmentInput(String, null context, valid baseUri) returns empty list when TreeBuilder produces no nodes (normal branch)
scenarios.precondition: Parser constructed with a stub TreeBuilder whose parseFragment(reader, context, baseUri, parser) returns an empty List; stub avoids mocking framework

scenarios.description: parseFragmentInput(String, non-null context, valid baseUri) returns list with one node when TreeBuilder produces single node
scenarios.precondition: Parser constructed with a stub TreeBuilder whose parseFragment returns a singleton List<Node>; stub avoids mocking framework
scenarios.expectedResult: returned List<Node> has size 1 and contains the stub Node instance

scenarios.description: parseFragmentInput(String, context, baseUri) propagates UncheckedIOException when Reader creation fails due to invalid fragment decoding (exception branch)
scenarios.precondition: none; StringReader construction will not throw, so simulate by using a Reader-overload stub instead

scenarios.description: parseFragmentInput(Reader, null context, valid baseUri) returns multiple nodes when TreeBuilder produces multiple nodes (loop-N)
scenarios.precondition: Parser constructed with a real implementation stub of TreeBuilder that returns a list of 3 stub nodes; avoids mocking framework
scenarios.expectedResult: returned List<Node> has size 3 and contains the sequence of stub nodes
pseudocode: List<Node> nodes = List.of(new StubNode(), new StubNode(), new StubNode());

scenarios.description: parseFragmentInput(Reader, non-null context, valid baseUri) propagates UncheckedIOException when Reader.read throws IOException
scenarios.precondition: Parser uses real HtmlTreeBuilder; provide Reader stub whose read() throws IOException to trigger UncheckedIOException
pseudocode: Reader failingReader = new Reader(){ public int read(char[] cbuf, int off, int len) throws IOException { throw new IOException("fail"); } public void close(){} };

scenarios.description: parseFragmentInput(String, non-null context, empty baseUri) returns list when baseUri is empty string (boundary baseUri)
scenarios.precondition: Parser with stub TreeBuilder returning single stub node
scenarios.expectedResult: returned List<Node> has size 1 and contains the stub Node instance
